programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to close the deal on Beyond the Close! Join us for the grand finale and winner celebration episode, where we'll reveal the triumphant super-agent who has risen to the very top of the competition. But that's not all. Get ready to hear firsthand from the contestants themselves as they reflect on their 90-day journey and share their growth, learnings, and future aspirations. It's a night of triumph, tears, and unforgettable moments as we bid farewell to the most thrilling season yet. And as if that wasn't enough, we have a very special guest in store. The one and only Christine Quinn, star of Netflix's Selling Sunset, will be joining us for the festivities. She'll be sharing her insights on the industry and giving us a glimpse into what it takes to be a top realtor. But wait, there's more! We'll be taking you on an exclusive tour of some of Miami's most luxurious properties, hosted by none other than some of America's top developers and agents. So sit back, relax, and get ready to be transported beyond the close.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Journey Through Alaska
programme.desc: Venture into the untamed heart of the north. This cinematic exploration takes you through deep-blue glaciers, towering granite peaks, and the vast, silent tundra where nature still reigns supreme. Experience the raw majesty of the Alaskan wilderness, from its rugged coastlines and crashing waves to the quiet, snow-draped landscapes that define the edge of the continent.

programme.title: Waterfall Relaxation
programme.desc: Unwind with the sights and sounds of a spectacular cascading waterfall in Northern California. Burney falls is a spring fed waterfall that has been referred to as the "eighth wonder of the world". This new release also features scenes from Manzanita Lake in Lassen National Park, a scenic high alpine lake with abundant bird life. Relaxing waterfall sounds and bird songs make this a wonderful escape from the pressures of daily life. {[TrailerUrl:https://vimeo.com/793652147]}

programme.title: Marcus Holman and the Moment He Became Obsessed with Lacrosse
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Marcus Holman - one of lacrosse’s greatest shooters and leaders - for an honest conversation about family, obsession, adversity, longevity, and chasing the all-time goals record. Marcus takes us back to his earliest memories from John's Hopkins’ locker room to the moment he fell in love with shooting He opens up about evolving his role, becoming a leader, sustaining greatness into his mid-30s, and what it would mean to cement his legacy in the record books.

From a chance clinic in eighth grade to a national championship as a freshman, Baptiste opens up about staying even-keeled, proving himself year after year, and why he still believes his best lacrosse is ahead of him.

programme.title: S1E1 Two Roads
programme.desc:
“Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today.
This episode features Olympic bronze medalist Kristian Ipsen, American rugby union star Carlin Isles — celebrated as “The Fastest Man in Rugby” — and his remarkable rise from track and field and American football to becoming a two-time Olympian in rugby sevens. You’ll also meet Allison Stokke, a record-breaking high school pole vaulter who went on to compete at UC Berkeley, and Miles Chamley-Watson, a British-American fencing champion whose career includes 13 team Pan American titles, a 2019 team world championship, a 2013 individual world championship, three Olympic appearances, and a 2016 team Olympic bronze medal.

programme.title: S1E2 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Trenten Merrill, an American Paralympic long jumper who claimed bronze at the 2020 Summer Paralympics. Also featured is Casey Patterson, a powerhouse in professional beach volleyball with numerous AVP tournament wins, a gold medal on the FIVB World Tour, and an appearance at the 2016 Rio Olympics alongside Jake Gibb. Tennis legends Bob and Mike Bryan, the most successful doubles team in history, take the spotlight with 16 Grand Slam titles, 119 ATP Tour doubles victories, 438 weeks as the world’s No. 1 team, and Olympic gold in 2012. Rounding out the episode is acclaimed gymnastics coach Liang Chow, celebrated for guiding Gabby Douglas to the 2012 Olympic all-around gold and coaching Shawn Johnson to multiple medals at the 2008 Olympics.

programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto
programme.desc: Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa on the adventure of a lifetime as they explore the vibrant cities and stunning beaches of Morocco. Plus, enjoy exclusive bonus footage featuring the very best of GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness: Consoling a Single Mom Who's Fallen on Hard Times

programme.title: Eat Play Stay: A Hauntingly Refreshing Getaway to Excelsior Springs, MO
programme.desc: Hop aboard an old school trolley for a tour of local wineries. Mingle with ghosts and see what’s on tap at the historic Hall of Waters, eat barbecue in a 100-year-old train station, and surrender to the comforts of the ultimate glampsite.
